Just last night I watched 'Gaman' on youtube. It was really travelling back to end of 70s era in Bombay. And today this song clip of Chhaya Ganguly came as a feed.

Gaman the 1978 cinema is honestly such a hauntingly beautiful masterpiece. Muzaffar Ali captured the lonely, bittersweet reality of migration in Mumbai so perfectly, and Farooq Sheikhâs performance is just heart-wrenching. Smita Patil, the so young Nana Patekar, Satish Shah, and Jalal Agha as Jaunpuri taxi driver, were all master class.

That soulful soundtrack by Jaidev, especially "Seene Mein Jalan," sung by Suresh Wadekar and "aapki yaad aati rahi raat bhar" by Chhaya Ganguly & penned by 'Makhdoom Mohiuddin ' still hits different even decades later.
